## Checklist (for reviewer)
- [ ] OOPs principles followed (encapsulation, inheritance used properly)
- [ ] Naming conventions followed (camelCase for methods, PascalCase for classes)
- [ ] No hardcoded values (using config/properties files)
- [ ] Page Object Model followed (no locators in test class)
- [ ] Proper waits used (no Thread.sleep)
- [ ] Test is independent (can run alone without depending on other tests)
